input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

samples.output: <think>An aerial shot shows a dense coastal city skyline beside a calm sea under a hazy sky. White text overlaid centrally states, "On August 4, 2020, a massive explosion occurred in the Port of Beirut, decimating the 5,000-year-old city." The lighting brightens considerably between frames, revealing clearer details of the high-rise buildings and urban sprawl along the waterfront.</think><answer></answer>

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

compressed_segments.text: [0-6] An aerial shot captures a dense coastal city skyline beside a calm sea under a hazy sky that brightens to reveal high-rise buildings. White text overlaid centrally reads, "On August 4, 2020, a massive explosion occurred in the Port of Beirut, decimating the 5,000-year-old city." The camera moves slowly forward toward a tall rectangular skyscraper on the right as warm sunset hues illuminate the scene. [6-8] The central text fades away completely, leaving an unobstructed view, while small white text "Estimated percentages" appears in the bottom left corner. [8-10] The scene cuts to religious architecture featuring tall minarets with crescent finials surrounding a blue dome and a bell tower topped with a cross. "Beirut, Lebanon" appears centrally over the buildings. [10-12] The view cuts abruptly to a close-up of dark blue ocean waves rippling across the frame, replacing all architectural structures. [12-16] Dark blue ocean waves ripple across the screen as the white title "GENERATION 17" fades in above a multi-colored dashed line, followed by the name "Nadine Khaouli" appearing below. [16-22] The video cuts to a woman with long dark hair driving in profile, passing beige buildings and trees with pink blossoms. The perspective shifts to an exterior

[70-72] Four people in neon yellow vests with Arabic text pack white grains into clear plastic bags in a warehouse; one wears a beige hijab, another a blue headband, and three wear face masks. [72-74] Several individuals in neon yellow vests walk in a line through a narrow outdoor alleyway carrying large brown cardboard boxes past weathered beige walls. [74-76] A man in a neon yellow vest and khaki shorts carries two stacked cardboard boxes displaying a blue logo and text "كفي يكفك" up concrete stairs past a wall with peeling red paint and white Arabic graffiti. [76-78] A woman with dark curly hair wearing a neon yellow safety vest and blue face mask walks through a doorway carrying a large, flat brown cardboard box. [78-80] A debris-strewn courtyard sits between damaged buildings with shattered windows and exposed wiring, where a white van is parked amidst rubble.

[82-84] A person in a neon yellow safety vest with a black logo and Arabic text "كفي بكفك" over a striped shirt swings a pickaxe at dusty ground near white sacks and buckets. [84-86] A woman with long dark hair wearing the same vest, black pants with a white side stripe, and white sneakers walks down a narrow stone alley toward a large wooden door. [86-88] A close-up profile shows the woman gazing at a blue ocean under a clear sky, sunlight illuminating her face. [88-90] The woman sits on a beige sofa facing the camera, wearing a black denim jacket with a red sequined heart patch on the shoulder and speaking.

[90-94] A woman with long dark hair sits on a beige sofa, speaking directly to the camera against a plain light-colored wall. She wears a black denim jacket adorned with a red sequined heart patch on the shoulder and a thin necklace. [94-96] A person wearing a neon yellow safety vest with a black logo and Arabic text "كم دفعت" on the back stands indoors, using a long yellow pole to scrape a damaged section of the white ceiling near a doorway. [96-98] Two children sit on stone steps in a narrow corridor illuminated by sunlight. The boy on the left wears a grey sweatshirt with black text and grey pants, smiling, while the girl on the right wears a dark patterned top and maroon pants, smiling.

[80-82] The scene cuts to an indoor shot of a person wearing a neon yellow safety vest over a pink hooded garment and blue face mask, standing near a dark window frame and white wall, facing left with their head slightly down. [98-102] Inside a bustling warehouse filled with stacks of cardboard boxes and supplies, a person in a neon yellow vest bends over items on a pallet. Behind them, an individual operates a yellow forklift near stacked goods. Volunteers sort through large piles of food supplies and yellow packages on tables while a person in a black sleeveless top packs items into a box. [102-104] The camera focuses on two people wearing neon yellow safety vests with the Arabic text "كفي بكفك" on the back, standing side-by-side. One wears brown shorts while the other has a black strap across their shoulder, both facing away as they work near piles of supplies in the hazy interior.

recent_thinks: [52-54] A person in a neon yellow safety vest with Arabic text and a white hoodie stands outside, handing a brown cardboard box through a barred window. They wear a blue face mask. Another cardboard box rests on a large log below the window, near wall graffiti reading "Lana Mam" with a red splatter mark underneath.

[66-68] A woman with long dark hair remains seated on a beige sofa, wearing a black denim jacket featuring a red sequined heart patch on the shoulder. She keeps her arms crossed while speaking directly to the camera against a plain white wall background.

[68-70] A woman wearing a neon yellow vest and face mask reaches through a gap in a rusty, yellow metal gate to hand a jar to someone inside. She carries a black backpack with floral patches, and the gate features peeling paint and Arabic script.

[104-106] The scene cuts to a dining room where a woman with long dark hair, wearing a cream jacket, sits at a round table with a beige cloth. She gestures with her hands while speaking to a boy in a blue shirt seated opposite her. Red and gold striped chairs surround the table near a dark wooden cabinet.

queries.question: What text is displayed directly below 'GENERATION 17'? A. Beirut, Lebanon B. Estimated percentages C. Nadine Khaouli D. August 4, 2020
